title: ModelWinAngle Property
description: Sets / returns the model window angle.
notes:
Sets and returns the model window angle. Setting values are valid only when ModelWinype is set to Rotated Rectangle.

See Also: ModelWinAngle Property

ModelWinType Property

Vision Objects: ModelWinAngle Property

Correlation

Geometric
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: Correlation, Geometric, OCR
